message:
bd-a7etx: Wire supervisor evidence emission to GeneralizedLedger

The conversion method (to_evidence_record) and tests existed but
record_evidence() wasn't actually calling it. This commit completes
the wiring so every supervision decision emits both a domain-specific
EvidenceEntry and a generalized EvidenceRecord.

9 emission wiring tests, 113 total supervision tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
